name: Sara Crewe
description: Sara is a young (seven at the series' beginning) English girl who has lived in India for most of her life. While her mother is dead, she loves her wealthy father dearly and is sad to leave him to attend boarding school. However, she is very optimistic and is able to make the best of her situation even when tragedy threatens to strike. Sara prefers reading to most traditional childhood games and can read books that are much harder than one would expect a little girl to read. Because of this, she'

name: Seara August
description: __Height:__ 159 cm The manager of Leon Magical shop, who has a very optimistic attitude, she enjoys teasing Raul and Fino, by often putting them in very awkward situations.
mediaTitles: I Couldn’t Become a Hero, So I Reluctantly Decided to Get a Job.
searchTerms: I Couldn’t Become a Hero, So I Reluctantly Decided to Get a Job.

name: Seiichi Kinoshita
description: The Director of Musashino Animation. Like many typical directors, Kinoshita tends to be nervous on the production of his team's work. The character is loosely based on [Seiji Mizushima](https://anilist.co/staff/100083/).

name: Sena Kuroi
description: A "super assistant" who appears in ch. 18 of "Mangaka-san to Assistant-san" manga. Has a physically weak body and likes cute things, although she's trying to hide both of those facts.
mediaTitles: The Comic Artist and Assistants Specials
searchTerms: The Comic Artist and Assistants Specials

name: Shingo Shouji
description: Shingo Shoji is a member of the Night Kids who drives a red Honda Civic SiR-II (EG-6). Shingo races dangerously—he will nudge his rival's car in order to make the other driver lose control. He doesn't find plain downhill races any fun, preferring to race under a mutual handicap he calls the Duct Tape Death Match. He detests Takeshi Nakazato because he believes that he is unfit to be leader of the Night Kids, a position that Shingo openly covets. In terms of racing ability, Shingo is the se

name: Shinkaiou
description: The Deep Sea King (深海王, Shinkaiō) ruled over the Seafolk as their king, and claimed the deep sea as his own. The Deep Sea King is a rather sadistic individual, who enjoys causing pain to others and starting fights. He is determined to take the surface world for himself to rule. He regards people as little more than food and has no qualms about treating them as such. He is also very arrogant and prideful, considering himself to be better than everyone and stating that he stands at the very top of

name: Shinnosuke Kobayakawa
description: Another student from Japan, a talented sculptor who befriends and lives across the street from Lili and Dorothy during their time in London.

name: Shinobu Ijuuin
description: His father had an affair with a German princess and what came from that union was the handsome Shinobu who resembled his mother. His parents were separated due to unequal birth and his mother was married off to someone else. His father could not stand the sight of his son who looked eerily like his lover and spent his years away from Japan until he died. As a result Shinobu spent his time with his grandparents whom he loved dearly, which explained why he was willing to marry Benio. He's a romant
mediaTitles: Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 1
Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 2
searchTerms: Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 1
Haikara-san: Here Comes Miss Modern – Part 2

name: Shirou Mizunuma
description: A high school boy who is the president of the student council.

name: Shouta Doi
description: __Height__: 162 cm Shouta Doi is a protagonist of the World's End Harem Manga. He is a third-year student at Keimon West Private High School and one of the five people able to resist the MK (Male Killer) Virus.

name: Shuntarou Harumi
description: A childhood friend of Punpun, who moved away as a child. ~!He comes back as an adult at the series finale, detached from the entire drama that had been going on in everyone's lives.!~

name: Spanner
description: __Height:__ 184 cm Spanner is British and was raised in Italy by his grandfather, who was a mechanic. He's a technophile and loves Japan because of its advancements in robotics. Spanner is an engineer in the Millefiore's Tech Department at the Merone Base and is a B-Ranked officer of the Black Spell. ~!He's interested in the power of the Vongola, to the point where he doesn't mind betraying his own Famiglia to help Tsuna complete the X-Burner.!~

name: Su
description: She is the mysterious being of light responsible for turning [Kyouko Jinguu](https://anilist.co/character/133102/Kyouko-Jinguu) into a magical girl, and taking all of the Mana Crystals from the Dark Realm. ~!Later, it is revealed that she sent Kyouko to attack the Dark Realm in order to get attention from [Maou](https://anilist.co/character/157951), her reclusive older sister.!~
mediaTitles: The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!
The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!
searchTerms: The Great Jahy Will Not Be Defeated!

name: Su-Yeon Kang
description: An innocent and talented looking freshman in the Arts department.

name: TJ
description: TJ is one of the legendary "Thousand Three" outlaws. He is known and feared as "Crazy TJ," both for his outlandish fashion and hairstyle, to his tendency to jump into danger even knowing the risks. He is employed by the Iron Motor automobile company to take part in the race. He feels a kinship with the brash Appare, especially with regard to crazy hairstyles. (Source: Anime News Network)

name: Top
description: Member no. 7 of the Round Table.

name: Tou Handa
description: [Hinaichi](https://anilist.co/character/217145/Hinaichi)'s subordinate. A dhampir and former high school classmate of [Ronaldo](https://anilist.co/character/195178/Ronaldo)'s. As a mama's boy, he hates that his vampire mother is a fan of Ronaldo's books and seeks to show her a less desirable side of the hunter. His hatred borders on obsession, his room decorated with Ronaldo posters and merchandise.
mediaTitles: The Vampire Dies in No Time
The Vampire Dies in No Time Season 2
The Vampire Dies in No Time
searchTerms: The Vampire Dies in No Time
The Vampire Dies in No Time Season 2

name: Turles
description: Turles is a Saiyan and the primary antagonist in the Dragon Ball Z movie special, The Tree of Might. He was once a member of the Saiyan Army under the Planet Trade Organization, but went defunct and off into the cosmos to conquer planets for himself. His first appearance was in the third Dragon Ball Z movie and the second was in the two-volume VHS O.V.A. released as a "Official Visual Guide" for the Bandai NES game, Plan to Eradicate the Saiyans. Turles' name is a pun on the vegetable "lettuce".
mediaTitles: Dragon Ball Z: The Tree of Might
Dragon Ball: Plan to Eradicate the Super Saiyans
searchTerms: Dragon Ball Z: The Tree of Might
Dragon Ball: Plan to Eradicate the Super Saiyans

name: Yaeno Muteki
description: **Height:** 159cm She runs with the dignity of a warrior. This Umamusume is rough and rugged. With fists that pierce the wind and kicks that shake the earth, this martial artist trains not to harm others but to succeed on the track. Though she strives to maintain discipline and decorum, her hotheaded side sometimes seeps to the surface. She loves her grandparents very much, and seeks to do them proud by spreading their school of martial arts far and wide.

name: Yixuan Wenren
mediaTitles: Wu Shan Wu Xing: Zhuo Yuan Shen Huo
Wu Shan Wu Xing: Xi Chuan Huan Zi Lin
searchTerms: Wu Shan Wu Xing: Zhuo Yuan Shen Huo
Wu Shan Wu Xing: Xi Chuan Huan Zi Lin

name: Yoshiharu Sagara
description: A modern-day teenager who finds himself in an alternative version of the Sengoku period where some of the famous warlords of the era are female. Using his knowledge from the video game, Nobunaga's Ambition, Sagara helps Nobuna in her quest to unite and conquer Japan. Also goes by the nickname "Monkey" much to his chagrin. He also finds himself being kicked around by Nobuna especially when he say or does something that irritates her or when she simply feels like it. (Source: Wikipedia)
